name: Fold Desk Sculpture

product_dna.core_purpose: Serve as a small abstract desk or shelf focal object.
product_dna.design_philosophy: One folded plane creates two volumes and a deep architectural shadow.
product_dna.emotional_appeal: A compact pause from visual clutter.
product_dna.target_customer: Minimal workspace and modern shelf-decor customers.
product_dna.functional_benefits: Purely decorative with optional paperweight mass after validation.
product_dna.decorative_benefits: Strong silhouette, changing shadow, and mineral presence.
product_dna.print_complexity: Moderate; overhang, balance, and surface quality need tests.
product_dna.material_efficiency: Shell construction may reduce mass but requires drain and stiffness design.
product_dna.brand_alignment: Maximum visual alignment, weaker functional value.
product_dna.future_evolution: Paired forms, mini study, weighted edition, and member variants.
product_dna.physical_manufacturing_potential: Possible as a cast desk object if customer value and stability validate.

design_tokens.wall_thickness: Hollow shell hypothesis with drain access
design_tokens.visual_weight: Visually grounded, physically light until tested

market_demand.rationale: EVD-009 marks direct abstract desk-sculpture demand Unknown; EVD-003 offers only general shelf-decor adjacency.

competition_opportunity.rationale: EVD-009 marks direct competitor evidence Unknown, leaving a possible but unmeasured opening.

profitability.rationale: EVD-009 marks price, resin cost, conversion, and perceived value Unknown.

evergreen_potential.rationale: EVD-003 supports general shelf decor outside seasonal motifs.

brand_alignment.rationale: EVD-009 marks market validation Unknown; the restrained folded plane is an exact internal brand expression.

collection_potential.rationale: EVD-003 supports shelf grouping; the object carries the collection's arch and shadow language.

bundle_potential.rationale: EVD-007 demonstrates collection packaging, while a purely decorative object adds limited functional breadth.

physical_product_potential.rationale: EVD-003 shows physical shelf-decor adjacency, though this exact form remains Unknown.

seo_opportunity.rationale: EVD-009 confirms direct search-language evidence is Unknown.

resin_printability.rationale: EVD-009 marks resin validation Unknown; the shell is feasible in principle but orientation and drainage matter.

ai_production_efficiency.rationale: EVD-009 marks production evidence Unknown; a single parametric fold supports fast variants.

customer_value.rationale: EVD-003 supports shelf decor but not willingness to pay for a purely decorative STL.

production_simplicity.rationale: EVD-009 marks print evidence Unknown; few features reduce modeling effort despite orientation tests.

marketplace_fit.rationale: EVD-003 supports Etsy shelf-decor context; Cults3D fit is Unknown.

risks: May be dismissed as generic abstract decor
improvement_actions: Research abstract desk sculpture STL terms
